name: speyer-ui
description: A lightweight, accessible design system for building clear, modern web applications. Color-blind friendly, mobile-first, AI-ready. Zero dependencies.
author: Adrian Speyer (https://github.com/adrianspeyer)

scripts.minify:css: cleancss -o dist/sui-tokens.min.css sui-tokens.css && cleancss -o dist/sui-components.min.css sui-components.css
scripts.build: npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js
scripts.version: npm run build && git add dist/
